SEARCH
Package org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua

Interface B2buaListener

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
B2buaServlet
public interface B2buaListener extends Serializable

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    callAbandoned(SipServletRequest outboundRequest)
    This method is called in response to receiving a CANCEL request.
    void
    callAnswered(SipServletResponse outboundResponse)
    Called after a 200 OK is received.
    void
    callCompleted(SipServletRequest outboundRequest)
    This method is called after receiving a BYE request.
    void
    callConnected(SipServletRequest outboundRequest)
    This method is called after the ACK for the initial INVITE is received.
    void
    callDeclined(SipServletResponse outboundResponse)
    This method is called after receiving an error status (like 404).
    void
    callStarted(SipServletRequest outboundRequest)
    Called upon an initial INVITE.

  • Method Details

    • callStarted

      void callStarted(SipServletRequest outboundRequest) throws ServletException, IOException
      Called upon an initial INVITE. This method contain a copy of the initial request from the caller to be sent to the caller after this method has been invoked. You may modify this SipServletRequest object. (Do not call the .send() method.)
      Parameters:
      outboundRequest - copy of the initial INVITE to be modified before sending
      Throws:
      ServletException - an exception
      IOException - an exception

    • callAnswered

      void callAnswered(SipServletResponse outboundResponse) throws ServletException, IOException
      Called after a 200 OK is received. This response object may be modified before it is sent back. (Do not call the .send() method.)
      Parameters:
      outboundResponse - modifiable successful response object
      Throws:
      ServletException - an exception
      IOException - an exception

    • callConnected

      void callConnected(SipServletRequest outboundRequest) throws ServletException, IOException
      This method is called after the ACK for the initial INVITE is received.
      Parameters:
      outboundRequest - a modifiable ACK request
      Throws:
      ServletException - an exception
      IOException - an exception

    • callCompleted

      void callCompleted(SipServletRequest outboundRequest) throws ServletException, IOException
      This method is called after receiving a BYE request.
      Parameters:
      outboundRequest - a modifiable BYE request
      Throws:
      ServletException - an exception
      IOException - an exception

    • callDeclined

      void callDeclined(SipServletResponse outboundResponse) throws ServletException, IOException
      This method is called after receiving an error status (like 404).
      Parameters:
      outboundResponse - a modifiable error response.
      Throws:
      ServletException - an exception
      IOException - an exception

    • callAbandoned

      void callAbandoned(SipServletRequest outboundRequest) throws ServletException, IOException
      This method is called in response to receiving a CANCEL request.
      Parameters:
      outboundRequest - a modifiable CANCEL request
      Throws:
      ServletException - an exception
      IOException - an exception
